data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for an approval workflow (supervisor review and approval) as outlined in the linked use case. However, there is no concrete evidence provided that demonstrates the existence or functionality of this approval process, leading to a clear gap in the requirement. The absence of API reads or persisted state checks specifically related to the approval workflow means that the requirement is not satisfied.
gaps: No evidence of an approval workflow functionality or related API endpoints to validate the requirement.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
